**Total functions:** 254

## Upstream Apache SedonaDB classification

Every kernel in `sedona-functions/src/register.rs` is classified as one of: **routed** (public `st_*` routes to the literal kernel), **intentionally-local** (has a bridge twin but kept local for a documented reason), **bridge-only** (exposed only as `sedona_st_*`), or **not-bridgeable** (table fn, aggregate, geography type, or special operator).

### Bridge-only (literal `sedona_st_*`, no public counterpart) (21)

| Function | Reason |
|---|---|
| `st_force3dm` | PostGIS delta: explicit z/m parameter required |
| `st_force4d` | PostGIS delta: explicit z/m parameters required |
| `st_geogfromwkb` | geography-type constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_geomfromwkbunchecked` | unvalidated constructor, literal-only for debugging |
| `st_geogfromwkt` | geography-type constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_geomcollfromtext` | typed constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_mlinefromtext` | typed constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_mpointfromtext` | typed constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_mpolyfromtext` | typed constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_geogpoint` | geography-type constructor |
| `st_pointm` | Z/M point constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_pointz` | Z/M point constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_pointzm` | Z/M point constructor, no public counterpart |
| `st_rotate_x` | 3D rotation, no public counterpart |
| `st_rotate_y` | 3D rotation, no public counterpart |
| `st_setcrs` | CRS-tagged variant |
| `st_crs` | CRS-tagged variant |
| `st_mmax` | Z/M accessor, no public counterpart |
| `st_mmin` | Z/M accessor, no public counterpart |
| `st_zmax` | Z/M accessor, no public counterpart |
| `st_zmin` | Z/M accessor, no public counterpart |

### Not bridgeable (10)

| Function | Reason |
|---|---|
| `st_knn` | special KNN operator, not a scalar UDF |
| `st_togeography` | geography type conversion, no DuckDB geography type |
| `st_togeometry` | geography type conversion, no DuckDB geography type |
| `st_analyze_agg` | aggregate — local st_envelope_agg / st_union_agg serve this role |
| `st_collect_agg` | aggregate — local st_collect aggregate |
| `st_envelope_agg` | aggregate — local st_envelope_agg aggregate |
| `sd_format` | SedonaDB extension function, not spatial SQL |
| `sd_order` | SedonaDB extension function |
| `sd_simplifystorage` | SedonaDB extension function |
| `st_dump` | table function — local ST_Dump with different return shape |

## Intentionally local `st_*` with literal twin

| Function | Reason |
|---|---|
| `st_dimension` | local returns -1 for EMPTY (PostGIS parity); bridge returns 0 |
| `st_geometryn` | bridge returns NULL for per-row varying integer index |
| `st_geomfromewkb` | trust-boundary constructor (input validation) |
| `st_geomfromewkt` | trust-boundary constructor (input validation) |
| `st_geomfromwkb` | trust-boundary constructor (input validation) |
| `st_interiorringn` | bridge returns NULL for per-row varying integer index |
| `st_pointn` | bridge returns NULL for per-row varying integer index |
| `st_setsrid` | writes EWKB SRID tag on the blob; bridge models SRID at type level and drops it |
| `st_srid` | reads EWKB SRID tag from the blob; bridge always returns 0 for plain WKB |
